rationale: Spike to evaluate GenAI fuzz testing of BSON libraries; security/test tooling exploration, no spec conformance issue.
New Atlas Search feature for UUID/null indexing; Issue split rollout of new functionality, not a spec violation.
Spec prohibits buildInfo in handshake; drivers sending buildInfo violate the Stable API/handshake spec requirement.
CI teardown script fails due to missing CLUSTER_NAME env var; Evergreen tooling bug, no driver spec involvement.
New server feature exposing rich updateDescription fields; Issue split feature rollout, driver was not doing anything wrong.
Unified test format missing topologyClosedEvent/topologyOpeningEvent definitions; UTF schema gap, not a driver behavior bug.
AWS KMS IAM permissions missing in Evergreen CI; cloud infrastructure/CI issue, no driver spec involvement.
mongo-orchestration breaks on MongoDB 4.0 due to pymongo dropping support; CI tooling dependency issue.
run-orchestration.sh fails to download x64 binaries on ARM Macs; CI tooling/platform issue.
Mongo-orchestration race condition assigning ports; CI test tooling bug, no driver spec involvement.
Process ticket about downstream ticket communication procedures; administrative task, no spec involvement.
New sort option for update command; Issue split feature rollout, driver was not violating any existing spec.
Server-side $dateToString ISO8601 violation; server bug fix propagated to driver APIs, not a driver spec nonconformance.
Mongo-orchestration race condition when creating sharded clusters; CI test tooling bug, no driver spec involvement.
Adding spec test for server deprioritization using address-only comparison; new test coverage for server selection spec gap.
Auth not enforced on standalone in test harness due to run-mongodb.sh bypass of mongo-orchestration; CI tooling bug.
Wire protocol spec requires $query/$orderby prefixes; drivers using unprefixed query/orderby violate spec.
Spec defines exact algorithm for when to send $readPreference to mongos; drivers sending it incorrectly break pre-2.4 mongos.
Wire protocol spec requires checking query failure bit on OP_GET_MORE replies; drivers not doing so violate spec.
Spec requires drivers to check min/maxWireVersion compatibility; failing to do so is a direct spec violation.
JSON parsing bug for quoted keys in Go driver; internal implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule violated.
Spec requires slaveOk bit set when connected directly to secondary; Go driver fails to set it in direct connection mode.
SDAM spec explicitly requires connectTimeoutMS as socket timeout for heartbeat connections; driver not following this.
Internal socket timeout strategy improvement; implementation design decision, no specific spec rule contradicted.
SDAM/CMAP spec requires clearing pool on network error; driver instead requests immediate heartbeat, violating spec.
Server selection spec requires tag support; driver had incorrect bson.D vs []bson.D type and incomplete implementation.
SDAM requires case-insensitive hostname comparison; driver FSM breaks for hostnames with capital letters.
Panic from send on closed channel during cluster monitor Stop; concurrency/implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
SDAM spec defines heartbeat monitoring algorithm; retrying successful isMaster deviates from specified monitoring behavior.
Sending buildInfo on every heartbeat is unnecessary spam; performance/behavior improvement, not a spec violation.
Data race conditions in server tests; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Evergreen config variables not passed correctly to mongo-orchestration bootstrap; CI configuration bug.
Internal refactor to create separate Decimal128 package; code organization improvement, no spec involvement.
API design change returning 2 uint32s for Timestamp instead of uint64; API ergonomics, no spec rule violated.
Adding Concat method to bson.Document; new API feature, not addressing any spec nonconformance.
New helper function to create bson.Reader from io.Reader; API convenience feature, no spec involvement.
API design improvement for NewDocument variadic signature; ergonomics refactor, no spec rule involved.
BSON decoder panics on int32-to-int64 cast and slice decoding; implementation bugs but BSON spec doesn't mandate numeric coercion rules at this level.
Replacing panic() with error returns in internal functions; code quality/safety improvement, no spec involvement.
SDAM spec tests fail on Windows due to ExtJSON ObjectId unmarshaling bug; test runner/BSON parsing issue blocking spec tests.
Spec requires primary read preference for aggregation with $out; driver used primary for all aggregations without checking pipeline.
BSON spec defines int32 lengths; driver should return error on negative lengths rather than panic or corrupt state.
Rename bson.ArrayConstructor to bson.ValueConstructor; internal API rename for clarity, no spec rule involved.
bson.Reader.Lookup returns (nil,nil) instead of ErrElementNotFound; internal API consistency fix, no spec rule violated.
API ergonomics improvement for Document.ElementAt; discoverability change, no spec involvement.
Adding DecodeBytes method to Cursor for BI Connector team; new API feature, not fixing spec nonconformance.
Missing FromHex function for ObjectID creation; new API convenience feature, no spec violation.
Documentation references non-existent Builder type in bson package; doc bug, no driver behavior or spec involved.
GoDoc documentation improvement for mongo.Cursor interface; API documentation change, no spec involvement.
Adding offset method to bson.Value for BI Connector byte slice reuse; new API feature, no spec nonconformance.
